---
name: Pull Request
about: Propose changes to Open-Jarvis
title: '[PR] '
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## Description
What does this PR do? Why is it needed?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / code cleanup

## Related issues
Fixes #(issue) or relates to #(issue)

## Testing
- [ ] All 94 self-tests pass (`python -c "from core.test_suite import TestSuite; t = TestSuite(); t.run_all()"`)
- [ ] New tests added (if applicable)
- [ ] Manual testing done

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I've added comments to hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I've updated relevant documentation
- [ ] I've added an entry to CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Add screenshots of UI changes.
